title: The neuroscience of lucid dreaming: Past, present, future.
author_string: Zerr, Paul, Adelhöfer, Nico, Dresler, Martin
abstract: Lucid dreaming allows conscious awareness and control of vivid dream states; however, its rarity and instability make neuroscientific experimentation challenging. Recent advances in wearable neurotechnology, large-scale collaborations, citizen neuroscience, and artificial intelligence increasingly facilitate the decoding of this intriguing phenomenon.
